results.name: has_hook
results.detail: "A *diverse gut* is a sign of aging well."

results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: The diverse-gut-as-aging-signal angle is decent but buries the scroll-stopper — 'trillions of microbes shift with age' is the hook, not the vague 'sign of aging well' framing.
rationales.clarity: Each slide lands one idea and the actionable slides (fermented foods, 30 plants) are concrete enough to act on this week.
rationales.audience_fit: Gut health resonates with the demo but 'healthspan' and 'frailty' skew older; a tired 28-year-old cares more about energy than longevity signaling.
rationales.novelty: Fermented foods and 30-plants-a-week have been circulating for years — nothing here reframes the idea or adds a surprising angle.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged, voice is plain and direct, CTA ties naturally to the food-scoring feature without AI-cringe or hype language.
rationales.predicted_performance: Solid save-bait on a proven topic but the lack of a contrarian hook or fresh angle keeps it from breaking out above the average gut-health post.
